description_long: This is a medium-sized hardcover book with a green cover and a white spine, lying flat on a smooth, light-colored surface. The book's cover is plain, with no visible illustration or artwork, and it appears to be in good condition with sharp edges and a clean finish. Resting on top of the book is a pair of white-framed eyeglasses, and next to the book is a white ceramic mug. The book's thickness suggests it contains a substantial number of pages, and the cover material appears to be a matte-finished, coated paper or cloth. The book is rectangular, with the front and back covers slightly larger than the pages within. No visible text, title, or publisher logo can be seen on the cover or spine from any angle.
description: A green hardcover book with a white spine, plain cover, and no visible text or illustration, lying flat with eyeglasses and a mug nearby.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the front, with the green cover, white spine, and eyeglasses resting on top clearly visible, alongside a white mug to the right.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the side, showing the white mug in front and the green cover behind, with the eyeglasses partially visible.
description_view_2: The book is seen from the back, with the green cover and white spine visible, and the mug now on the left side.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the opposite side, with the mug directly behind the book and the eyeglasses on top clearly visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is white and plain, with no visible text or decorative elements. It appears clean and unadorned.
